Anand Rathi bullish, expects strongest earnings performance in sector for Q4, driven by jump in volumes, profitability, iron ore mining exposure, and capacity additions. Revenue projected at Rs 6,969.2 crore and EBITDA at Rs 2,093.3 crore (YoY growth of 484% in revenue and 701.7% in EBITDA).

Anand Rathi core pick, upgraded view due to improving domestic pricing environment, supportive policy backdrop, and better earnings visibility across domestic and EU operations. Q4 EBITDA per tonne estimated at Rs 10,938 (38.9% increase YoY).

Anand Rathi top pick due to positioning in ferro chrome segment and steady demand from stainless steel industry, offering a stable earnings profile. Q4 revenue projected at Rs 740.2 crore and EBITDA at Rs 146.9 crore.

Board to consider and recommend bonus shares issue. Stock price jumped over 5.38%. Strong Q3 FY26 results: consolidated net profit up 17.46% YoY, net premium income up 17.76% YoY, first-year premium jumped 45.2%.
Stock rallied around 6% to a record high of ₹4,470 on BSE. Reported strong Q4 business update with 42% YoY growth in domestic business and 156% YoY growth in international operations.
Mentioned in Q4 result preview for IT Services sector, which is expected to report moderate growth due to lack of demand and macroeconomic uncertainties.
